Method–provenance summary
Property: condensed Fukui functions f+, f–, dual descriptor for nitrobenzene; most‐electrophilic site f+ value reported here.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF.
Geometry provenance: single-point evaluation on the user-supplied XYZ geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz); no further optimisation (denoted DFT//input-XYZ).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software: chemkit-DFT front-end (PySCF backend; version as bundled with chemkit).
Convergence & warnings: SCF cycles converged; integrity status "ok", trustworthy = true.
